calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:50am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Dennis Birkhimer, appears through counsel Allen Kent; Respondent, Amy Elizabeth Irvine, appears in Pro Per. Appearing with appellant as a witness, is Bernadette McManamin. Parties and the witness are sworn. Mr. Kent lodges a trial brief, with exhibits. Parties present their respective cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
EXHA(1) Trial brief with exhibits
11:50am
Matter is submitted. Exhibit is retained, and placed in the file.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Continued To Dec-03-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
